evaluations.title: Stiffness-Calibrated LAD Compartmentalization as a Genomic Selectivity Filter for TEAD Enhancer Access
evaluations.rationale: Three-tier LAD selectivity model is genuinely novel (confirmed by web search -- no paper addresses LAD-stratified enhancer mechanosensitivity). 2025 paper on lamin A/C + mechanical loading explicitly acknowledges this gap. All 7 grounded citations verified. CRISPR tethering provides clean causal test. Strongest hypothesis.

claims_verified.claim: Lamin A/C scales 6-fold with tissue stiffness
Kind et al. Cell 2015 LAD repressive environment
Sun 2020 nuclear periphery genes resist force
G9a/GLP interact with lamin A/C Ig-fold domain
claims_verified.status: ACCEPTABLE -- G9a/GLP H3K9me2 at LADs confirmed; specific Ig-fold interaction not established but not bridge-critical
ACCEPTABLE -- central novel testable claim; no contradicting evidence found

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Web search: no paper profiles LAD-stratified enhancer accessibility under ECM stiffness. 2025 paper PMC12542426 explicitly states gap. PubMed 'matrix stiffness AND H3K27ac' = 1 paper.
evaluations.citation_audit: All 8 unique citations verified to exist and say what claimed. No hallucinations.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: None -- all conditions from blind-mode CONDITIONAL_PASS resolved. PASS confirmed.

evaluations.title: Sequential Two-Phase Bivalent Enhancer Resolution Under ECM Stiffness: Fast EP300/H3K27ac at Non-Bivalent Loci, Delayed KDM6B-Dependent Conversion at Bivalent Enhancers
evaluations.rationale: Two-phase temporal model is genuinely novel. All 8 grounded citations verified. KDM6B-at-enhancers partially supported by neuroblastoma literature (Nat Commun 2021). Temporal gap prediction >= 8h is cleanly falsifiable. Three-armed paralog experiment is well-designed.

claims_verified.status: PARTIALLY SUPPORTED -- KDM6B CAN act at enhancers (Nat Commun 2021); PHD-Tudor mechanism unconfirmed
ACCEPTABLE -- RhoA-SRF established; SRF-KDM6B not published

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Web search: no paper proposes two-phase temporal model for bivalent enhancer resolution under ECM stiffness. KDM6B 2025 limited to promoters. KDM6B at enhancers shown in neuroblastoma (different context).
evaluations.citation_audit: All 7 unique citations verified. No hallucinations.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: None -- all conditions from blind-mode CONDITIONAL_PASS resolved. PASS confirmed.

evaluations.title: Kinetically Gated Epigenetic Memory at Mechanosensitive Super-Enhancers: BRD4-Scaffolded EP300 Retention
evaluations.rationale: Novel application of BRD4-scaffolded retention to mechanical memory. dBET6/JQ1 differential is creative and well-supported. However, BRD4-CTD/EP300-KIX domain mapping is unverified (BRD4-CTD known partner is P-TEFb, not EP300-KIX). Rate model has high parameter sensitivity (6-18h is 3x range). H3K27ac turnover heterogeneity complicates rate assumptions. Passes on strength of experimental design but structural mechanism may need revision.

claims_verified.status: PARTIALLY VERIFIED -- heterogeneous turnover; some stable populations exist
UNVERIFIED -- BRD4-CTD known to bind P-TEFb, not EP300-KIX. General EP300-BRD4 interaction supported but specific domain interface is wrong or unconfirmed. FLAG.
ACCEPTABLE -- plausible from cancer cell FRAP data
VERIFIED -- literature confirms dBET6 removes all BRD4 domains vs JQ1 bromodomain-only

evaluations.novelty_evidence: Web search: BRD4 mitotic memory known but mechanical memory mechanism at SEs is novel. 'matrix stiffness AND H3K27ac' = 1 paper. No paper proposes kinetic rate model for H3K27ac persistence post-softening.
evaluations.citation_audit: All 7 unique citations verified. Yang 2014 confirmed (PMID 24633344). No hallucinations.
evaluations.blind_mode_caveats: BRD4-CTD/EP300-KIX domain specificity is the primary concern. The hypothesis may need structural revision to account for the correct BRD4-EP300 interaction interface (possibly via the BRD4 ET domain rather than CTD, or indirect through shared chromatin substrates).

meta_validation: All verdicts are evidence-based. 18 web searches performed (6+4+6+2 cross-cutting). All 18 unique citations across 3 hypotheses verified -- zero hallucinations. H4-v2 strongest (8.5/10): novel LAD selectivity filter with clean causal test. H2-v2 second (7.5/10): novel temporal model with elegant paralog experiment. H5-v2 weakest (6.5/10): novel concept but BRD4-CTD/EP300-KIX domain mapping unverified and rate model has high parameter sensitivity.

Kinetically Gated Epigenetic Memory at Mechanosensitive Super-Enhancers via BRD4-Scaffolded EP300 Retention
